MSA15 -734-716-720

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

      "debit d air frais": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "pression atmospherique": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "temperature carburant": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "temperature d air": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "temperature d eau": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "tension batterie mesuree": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "vitesse du vehicule": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 20,
    "sentbytes": "21A9",
    "name": "Trame 9",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"

        "ref": true
